generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on overseas tech to undermine national security? By supporting strategic autonomy, we can protect our critical infrastructure from cyber threats and ensure our allies don't hold all the cards. Don't let complacency put us at risk - it's time to take control of our future. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
